arts.ttl: Chelsea bombshell as Osimhen truth revealed
arts.sum: Plus, the truth behind the rumours of Victor Osimhen staying at Galatasaray was revealed and Man Utd received a 'win-win' offer. Al-Nassr are ready to go big this summer and are targeting a shock move for Chelsea superstar Moises Caicedo .

arts.ttl: Arsenal leave Chelsea stunned after Moises Caicedo transfer demand
arts.sum: Arsenal have entered the race for Chelsea target Joel Ordonez, according to a report. According to Just Arsenal, the Gunners have now entered the race to sign Ordonez as they look to add a young defender to their ranks.

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Legia Warsaw injury, suspension list, predicted XIs

arts.ttl: ‘Right direction’: Enzo Maresca defends Chelsea’s style before Legia Warsaw test
arts.sum: ‘The fans have to trust the team and trust the club’ Chelsea lead Conference League quarter-final tie 3-0 Enzo Maresca believes Chelsea are going in the “right direction”, with the manager defending his style of play and asking fans to “trust the team”. Chelsea face Legia Warsaw at home in the Conference League quarter-final second leg on Thursday, with a passage to the semi-finals all but sealed after a 3-0 win last week. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca admits what he's 'not able to do' in message to angry Chelsea fans
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca is in the midst of his first season as manager at Stamford Bridge and has stuck by his philosophy despite the frustration of the Blues' fanbase

arts.ttl: Maresca insists Chelsea have made progress
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has insisted that Chelsea have made significant progress under him despite unrest among fans. The Blues are sixth in the Premier League table with six games remaining – and very much involved in the battle for a Champions League place.
